title: Team Protocols
description: Requests between workers become typed coordination protocols.

steps.content: Ask the reviewer to approve the implementation plan before we start changing files.
steps.annotation: This needs more structure than an informal note.

steps.content: {"to":"reviewer","plan":"Update chapter order, rewrite docs, regenerate metadata"}
steps.annotation: The request is sent as a typed protocol with a tracked id.

steps.content: Created plan request req-7 for reviewer
steps.annotation: The lifecycle begins in a pending state.
The runtime checks whether any tracked requests changed state.
The protocol state machine updates independently of casual chat.

steps.content: The implementation plan is now formally approved, so file changes can begin.
steps.annotation: Typed protocols turn coordination into something the harness can reason about.
